title: deminout: Don't demote inouts with unused bits

features.name: inout port with partially used bits
features.description: Code should include an inout port where only some bits are used by assignments, with unused bits that should remain high-z rather than being driven to 'x'

features.name: inout bit-range slice assignment
features.description: Code should include an inout vector port where only an upper or lower bit slice is assigned, leaving the other slice unused

features.name: inout to output demotion with mixed usage
features.description: Code should include an inout port used in two contexts: as output in an assign statement and left unused in other bit positions
